gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用荒诞的语音留言编织跨越生死的浪漫，笑中带泪的治愈小品。
gems.whyWatchEn: A hilarious and heartwarming romance built on misdirected voicemails to the dead, proving love can find the most absurd frequencies.
gems.audience: 喜欢《真爱至上》式温暖巧合、能接受轻微奇幻设定的浪漫喜剧爱好者。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of warm coincidences like 'Love Actually' and romantic comedy lovers open to a touch of magical realism.
